task_completion.description: Source and target accounts are correctly selected in the transfer dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the transfer dialog, the 'From' or source account is set to 'Sparkasse Giro' and the 'To' or target account is set to 'Interactive Brokers'.

task_completion.description: The transfer date is set to October 15, 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Date field in the transfer dialog shows '2024-10-15' or 'October 15, 2024'.

task_completion.description: The correct outgoing and incoming amounts are entered
task_completion.visual_evidence: The transfer dialog shows an outgoing amount of 2,500.00 EUR and an incoming amount of 2,725.00 USD (or an exchange rate of 1.09 USD/EUR is explicitly visible and applied to the 2,500.00 EUR).

task_completion.description: The transfer is successfully recorded and visible in the account transactions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The completed transfer appears as a transaction in the 'Transactions' or 'Account' view for either 'Sparkasse Giro' or 'Interactive Brokers', showing the correct date and amount.

task_completion.description: The portfolio file is saved after recording the transfer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save icon is clicked, or there is no asterisk (*) next to the filename 'forex_portfolio.xml' in the application's title bar or tab, indicating there are no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the Portfolio Performance graphical user interface to record the transfer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Portfolio Performance application menus and dialogs, rather than using a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by editing the XML file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) open with the 'forex_portfolio.xml' file modifying the raw XML data.

integrity.description: The transaction was actually created in the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The transaction is visible in the structured transaction list of the application, not just typed into a search bar, notes field, or a mocked window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires recording a cross-currency transfer in Portfolio Performance. Source account: 'Sparkasse Giro' (EUR). Target account: 'Interactive Brokers' (USD). Date: 2024-10-15. Outgoing amount: 2,500.00 EUR. Incoming amount: 2,725.00 USD (Exchange rate: 1.09 USD/EUR). The portfolio file is located at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/forex_portfolio.xml.
